ideas.name: Resource Utilization
ideas.desc: Tracks consultant utilization and capacity, forecasts demand, analyzes bench costs, and generates staffing recommendations to meet targets. Monitors utilization by level (Senior 85%, Manager 80%) with bench cost analysis and project pipeline matching.

ideas.name: Client Health Score
ideas.desc: Computes client health scores from NPS, margins, utilization, and escalation data to identify at-risk accounts and drive retention strategies. Tracks project budget burn rate, milestone delivery, and CSAT signals.

ideas.name: Contract Risk Review
ideas.desc: Scans contracts for risky clauses, evaluates compliance with internal policies, and produces renegotiation briefs with prioritized amendments. Flags scope creep risk, liability exposure, IP ownership gaps, and non-standard payment terms.

ideas.name: Proposal Copilot
ideas.desc: Generates competitive proposals with pricing models, win-theme analysis from historical data, and competitive positioning against known bidders. Pulls from past proposals, case studies, and SME bios.

ideas.name: Time Entry & Billing
ideas.desc: Processes time entries against billing rules, surfaces unbilled hours, audits entries for compliance, and prepares invoice packages. Reminds consultants to submit timesheets and validates against project codes.
